metadata.title: Cardium — Virtual Cards for Media Buyers | Instant Visa Cards for Google Ads, Meta & TikTok
metadata.description: Issue unlimited virtual Visa cards in seconds. Top up any amount from $100 to $10,000+. Built for Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, and every ad platform. Fund with crypto, pay everywhere.

hero.subtitle: Issue unlimited virtual Visa cards in seconds. Top up any amount — $100, $500, or $10,000 — and start spending instantly on Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, and every ad platform. Fund with crypto, manage your balance, scale without limits.

features.title: Everything you need to scale your ad spend
features.subtitle: A complete virtual card infrastructure built for modern marketing teams. From instant card issuing to advanced analytics, Cardium gives you full control over every dollar.

instantCards.title: Instant Card Issuing
instantCards.description: Create unlimited virtual Visa cards in seconds. Each card gets its own BIN, balance, and granular spending controls. Perfect for isolating campaigns and tracking spend per account.

cryptoTopUp.title: Flexible Top-Up
cryptoTopUp.description: Top up your balance with any amount — from $100 to $10,000+. Fund via 30+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, ETH, USDT, and all major stablecoins. Instant conversion at competitive rates.

teamAccounts.title: Team Management
teamAccounts.description: Distribute cards and budgets across your entire team. Set role-based access controls, individual spending limits, and monitor all card activity in real-time from one dashboard.

api.title: Powerful REST API
api.description: Full REST API for programmatic card management, balance operations, transaction history, and webhook notifications. Build custom automations and integrate with your existing tools.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Track spend patterns across campaigns, monitor ROI per ad account, and export detailed reports. Real-time dashboards with custom alerts keep you informed.

security.title: 3DS Security
security.description: Every transaction is protected with 3D Secure 2.0 authentication. Our PCI DSS Level 1 compliant infrastructure ensures your funds and data are always safe.

benefits.title: Built for performance marketers
benefits.subtitle: Every feature is designed to help you spend smarter, scale faster, and stay in complete control of your advertising budgets.

speed.title: Lightning-Fast Card Issuing
speed.description: Stop waiting for bank approvals. Create virtual cards instantly and start running campaigns in minutes, not days. Our streamlined process means you never miss an opportunity.
points: No paperwork or bank visits required
Instant activation for all major ad platforms
Set custom spending limits per card

global.title: Global Coverage, Local Performance
global.description: Run campaigns in 150+ countries with cards that work everywhere. Our multi-BIN infrastructure ensures high approval rates on every ad platform, regardless of geography.
points: Accepted on all major ad networks worldwide
Localized BINs for higher approval rates

automation.title: Automated Spend Management
automation.description: Set up rules and let Cardium handle the rest. Automatic top-ups, budget alerts, and card rotation keep your campaigns running smoothly around the clock.
points: Auto top-up when balance runs low

growth.title: Scale Without Limits
growth.description: Whether you're managing 10 cards or 10,000, Cardium grows with you. Top up your balance with any amount and create as many cards as you need.
points: Top up any amount, any time
No cap on monthly transaction volume

integrations.title: Works with every platform you use
integrations.subtitle: Cardium cards are accepted on all major advertising and e-commerce platforms out of the box.

comparison.title: See how Cardium stacks up
comparison.subtitle: We built Cardium to be the best virtual card platform for media buyers. Here's how we compare.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes, not days

register.description: Sign up in under 2 minutes with just your email. No paperwork, no waiting, no credit checks required.

fund.title: Top Up Any Amount
fund.description: Add $100, $500, $5,000 — whatever your campaigns need. Fund via 30+ cryptocurrencies or wire transfer. Balance is available instantly.

spend.title: Issue Cards & Scale
spend.description: Create unlimited virtual cards from your balance and start running campaigns on any platform worldwide. Full control, zero friction.

rates.title: Pay as you go. No monthly fees.
rates.subtitle: No subscriptions, no tiers, no hidden fees. Simply top up your balance with any amount and start issuing cards. You only pay for what you use.
rates.topUpDescription: Choose any amount that fits your campaigns. Your balance is available instantly after top-up. Create unlimited cards and distribute funds as you need.

highlights.title: Card Creation
highlights.description: Issue unlimited virtual Visa cards at no extra cost from your balance

highlights.title: Top-Up Fee

highlights.title: Minimum Top-Up
highlights.description: Start small and scale up. No maximum limit on your balance

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.content: Cardium transformed our ad spend workflow. We went from managing 50 cards manually to 500+ cards with automated controls. The time savings alone paid for itself in the first week. Absolute game changer for any serious media buyer.

items.name: Marcus Rodriguez
items.content: The flexible top-up model is perfect — we just add funds when we need them. No monthly fees eating into our margins. Plus, the crypto funding saves us thousands in conversion fees every month.

items.name: Elena Volkova
items.content: Finally, a payment platform that truly understands media buyers. The real-time analytics, spending controls, and multi-BIN support are exactly what our 40-person team needed to scale confidently.

items.name: James Park
items.content: We tested every virtual card provider on the market. Cardium had the highest approval rates, the fastest card issuing, and the best support team. We moved our entire operation over in a weekend.

items.name: Ana Petrova
items.content: Managing ad spend across 12 countries used to be a nightmare. Cardium's multi-currency support and localized BINs solved that completely. Our approval rates went from 78% to 97%.

items.name: David Kim
items.content: The API is beautifully designed. We built a custom dashboard on top of Cardium that auto-creates cards, sets budgets, and rotates payment methods — all programmatically. Incredible platform.

security.title: Enterprise-grade security you can trust
security.subtitle: Your funds and data are protected by the highest industry security standards. We take compliance seriously so you can focus on growing your business.

pci.description: Highest level of payment card industry security compliance, audited annually

3ds.title: 3D Secure 2.0
3ds.description: Advanced authentication protocol that protects every single transaction

encryption.description: Military-grade AES-256 encryption for all data at rest and in transit

soc2.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: Independently audited security controls, processes, and infrastructure

q1.question: How quickly can I issue a virtual card?
q1.answer: Instantly. Once your account is funded, you can create unlimited virtual cards in just a few clicks. Most users issue their first card within 3 minutes of signing up.

q2.question: How does top-up work?
q2.answer: Simply choose any amount starting from $100 and fund via 30+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, ETH, USDT, and USDC. Your balance is available instantly after confirmation. There are no monthly fees — you only pay a simple 3% top-up fee on crypto deposits.

q3.question: Is there a minimum or maximum top-up amount?
q3.answer: The minimum top-up is $100. There is no maximum — top up $100, $1,000, or $50,000 depending on your campaign needs. Your full balance is available immediately to create cards and start spending.

q4.question: How does team management work?
q4.answer: You can invite team members, assign roles (admin, manager, viewer), set individual spending limits per person or per card, and monitor all card activity in real-time from your centralized dashboard.

q5.question: What ad platforms are supported?
q5.answer: Cardium cards work with all major ad platforms including Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Microsoft Ads, Snapchat, Pinterest, Amazon Ads, and 100+ more. Our multi-BIN infrastructure ensures high approval rates everywhere.

q6.question: Can I use Cardium for non-advertising purchases?
q6.answer: Yes! While Cardium is optimized for media buying, our virtual Visa cards work everywhere Visa is accepted — SaaS subscriptions, e-commerce, hosting, and more.

q7.question: Which cryptocurrencies do you support for top-up?
q7.answer: We support 30+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, ETH, USDT (TRC20 & ERC20), USDC, and all major stablecoins. Conversion is instant and rates are updated in real-time with no hidden markups.

cta.title: Ready to supercharge your ad spend?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of media buyers who are already scaling their campaigns with Cardium. Top up any amount and start issuing cards in minutes.

footer.description: Virtual card infrastructure for modern marketing teams. Issue unlimited cards, fund with crypto, and scale campaigns without limits. Top up any amount, create cards instantly. Your cards. Your rules.

about.title: About Cardium
about.subtitle: We're building the future of digital payments for modern marketing teams. Our mission is to make virtual card infrastructure accessible, powerful, and easy to use for businesses of every size.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize access to virtual card infrastructure, enabling businesses of all sizes to scale their digital ad spend with confidence, security, and transparency. We believe every media buyer — from solo freelancers to enterprise agencies — deserves powerful payment tools without complexity or monthly fees.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded by a team of fintech veterans and media buying experts, Cardium was born from a simple frustration: existing payment solutions weren't built for the speed and scale that modern digital marketing demands. After years of dealing with slow bank approvals, limited card counts, rigid pricing tiers, and opaque fees, we set out to build something better — a platform where you top up any amount and start spending immediately.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no monthly subscriptions, no surprises. A simple top-up fee is all you pay. We publish our rates openly.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of what's possible in digital payments with cutting-edge technology and multi-BIN infrastructure.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Your trust is our foundation. PCI DSS Level 1, 3D Secure 2.0, and 256-bit encryption protect every transaction and every dollar.

support.title: Customer Focus
support.description: Your success is our success. We provide dedicated support whenever you need us, 24/7, with real humans who understand media buying.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Cardium is built by a globally distributed team of 50+ engineers, fintech specialists, and marketing experts. We've processed over $500M in monthly volume and issued 2M+ virtual cards for media buyers across 150+ countries.

whyUs.title: Why Media Buyers Choose Cardium
items: No monthly fees or subscriptions — pay only when you top up
Instant card issuing with multi-BIN support for high approval rates
30+ cryptocurrencies accepted for funding your balance
Real-time analytics and spending controls for every card
Trusted by 10,000+ media buyers managing $500M+ monthly

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about Cardium? Need help with your account, top-ups, or card management? We'd love to hear from you. Our team typically responds within 2 hours during business hours.
